mapper.insert: insert into pf_member_card(member_id, member_name, card_type, total_times, remaining_times, expire_date, status, create_time, update_time) values(#{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{cardType}, #{totalTimes}, #{remainingTimes}, #{expireDate}, 'ACTIVE', now(), now())
mapper.select: select * from pf_member_card order by member_id
mapper.update: update pf_member_card set remaining_times = remaining_times - 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and remaining_times > 0
